title: digitalis grandiflora
intro: Digitalis grandiflora is a flowering plant species in the foxglove family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. Its leaves and flowers contain cardiac glycosides, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including the treatment of heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The plant's health benefits include lowering blood pressure, improving heart function, and reducing inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for individuals with cardiovascular issues. Digitalis grandiflora can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
